description: A single interaction event from any channel. Written to the C3 event ledger by every channel adapter.

journeyId.note: One journey can span multiple channels

caseId.source: Challenge 1 application ID — null if no C1 case yet

rawMessage.note: Exact text from customer — never modified

normalizedIntent.note: Set by input normalizer — null until normalized

normalizedEntities.note: Extracted entities from normalizer — service type, document names, etc.

deterministicAnswerUsed.note: true if answer came from live store without any model call

customerReply.note: Final response sent to customer — after output humanizer
